prompt: Cutoff opened, button called, and hero is in the big blind with T7o. Which simple action fits best now?
why_v1: When pressure stacks from multiple players, a weak offsuit hand should release instead of guessing.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. With an open and a call already in front of you, T7o in the big blind is too weak to continue honestly, so this stacked-pressure spot should fold.
